description: Fix the spreadsheet's disastrous print layout. Configure the page orientation, scaling, column widths, and margins to produce a clean document that fits on a reasonable number of pages.

natural_language.prompt: The inventory spreadsheet looks fine on screen but will print across 3-4 pages horizontally. Fix the print layout by configuring page orientation, scaling, column widths, and margins so it prints cleanly on 1-2 pages wide.
